channel.title: Kerala University — SDE Results
channel.description: New SDE result notifications from University of Kerala results page.

item.title: FIRST AND SECOND SEMESTER Master of Library and Information Science (M.L.I.Sc/M.Lib.I.Sc) Degree Examination (SDE-Regular (2024 admission), Supplementary (2023 & 2022 admissions) and Mercy Chance(2017
